name: Book of Spells
short_description: Book of Spells is an adventure game with RPG elements. You will take on the role of a traveler eager for new adventures!
detailed_description:
Book of Spells is an adventure game with RPG elements. You will take on the role of a traveler eager for new adventures! Early in the morning you meet a stranger who asks you to find an ancient book of spells. Not knowing what dangers await you on this path, you agree and set off on an exciting adventure!

You have to explore colorful locations, help local residents with their problems, fight dangerous opponents and bosses, and most importantly, find a book of spells!

Peculiarities
- Great soundtrack
- Colorful graphics.
- Dangerous opponents
